prompt: List every .png and .gif file under assets/ with full paths. For each file report: filename, dimensions if you can determine them, and which entity it likely belongs to based on the name. Write results as JSON to status/asset-inventory.json.

List every .json file under docs/data/. For each file: count the number of top-level entries, list the first 3 entry IDs/names, and note the schema (what fields each entry has). Write results to status/data-inventory.json.
Search all .rs files in src/ for any hardcoded sprite paths, asset paths, or filename strings. List every hardcoded asset reference with file and line number. Write to status/hardcoded-assets.txt.
